message:
fix: use showSkeleton from useCardLoadingState in ControlPlaneHealth (#3796) (#3806)

The card was ignoring the showSkeleton return value from useCardLoadingState
and instead using its own isLoading check with a custom animate-pulse div.
Now uses the Skeleton component, consistent with all other cards.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
